data.summary: Sensei! The Tea Party group story will soon be revealed! The members are doing their best for Nagisa
data.body:
Sensei! The Tea Party group story will soon be revealed!

The members are doing their best for Nagisa, who collapsed from overwork… but what exactly happened?
